reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify New York State counties with 29,000 to 75,000 SNAP households, 350 to 600 children in foster care, and 5,000 to 18,000 adults in mental health programs; keep counties satisfying all three population-support filters.
2. From the counties kept in step 1, keep the county with a Temporary Assistance caseload of 4,000 to 6,000, social services staff of 600 to 1,000, and 200 to 400 new case openings per month.
3. Determine the county seat of the county kept in step 2.
4. Determine the year that county seat was incorporated as a city and return the year.
original_final_question: I am analyzing a specific New York State county which supports a significant population, reporting between 29,000 and 75,000 households on SNAP, 350 to 600 children in foster care, and 5,000 to 18,000 adults in mental health programs. Operationally, it manages a Temporary Assistance caseload of 4,000 to 6,000 using a staff of 600 to 1,000, while processing between 200 and 400 new case openings per month. What year was its county seat incorporated as a city? Please return the year only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 (SNAP Caseloads): Find NY counties with SNAP households 29K-75K → {Suffolk, Monroe, Westchester, Onondaga, Nassau}
Node 2 (Foster Care): Find NY counties with 350-600 children in care → {Erie, Onondaga, Suffolk, Oneida, Monroe}
Node 3 (Mental Health): Find NY counties with 5K-18K adult MH recipients → {Monroe, Erie, Westchester, Suffolk, Nassau, Onondaga}
Intersection of nodes 1-3: {Suffolk, Monroe, Onondaga} - Westchester excluded (foster care 271), Nassau excluded (foster care 125), Erie/Oneida excluded (SNAP out of range)
Nodes 1-3 form Hop 1 (d=3): Three independent criteria intersect to identify three counties
Node 4 (PA Caseloads): From {Suffolk, Monroe, Onondaga}, filter to TA cases 4K-6K → {Suffolk, Onondaga} (Monroe 6,940 excluded)
Node 5 (SSD Staff): From {Suffolk, Monroe, Onondaga}, filter to staff 600-1000 → {Monroe, Onondaga} (Suffolk 1,499 excluded)
Node 6 (PA Cases Opened): From {Suffolk, Monroe, Onondaga}, filter to openings 200-400 → {Monroe, Onondaga} (Suffolk 640 excluded)
Intersection of nodes 4-6: {Suffolk, Onondaga} ∩ {Monroe, Onondaga} ∩ {Monroe, Onondaga} = {Onondaga}
Nodes 4-6 form Hop 2 (d=3): Three criteria ALL applied to same input {Suffolk, Monroe, Onondaga}, results intersected
Node 7 (Wikipedia): Find county seat of Onondaga County → Syracuse
Node 7 forms Hop 3 (d=1): Single Wikipedia lookup for county seat
Node 8 (Wikipedia): Find when Syracuse was incorporated as a city → 1847
Node 8 forms Hop 4 (d=1): Single Wikipedia lookup for final answer

ideal_code.intent: Which NY counties had SNAP households between 29,000 and 75,000 in February 2023?
ideal_code.code:
import boto3
import pandas as pd
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config
from io import StringIO

bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
key = "datagov/annual-youth-detention-admissions-by-county-beginning-2006/files/rows.txt"
s3 = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))
body = s3.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=key)["Body"].read().decode("utf-8")
df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(body))
df.columns = [c.strip() for c in df.columns]
df = df[
    (df["Year"] == 2015)
    & (df["County"] != "New York City")
    & (df["Secure/Mixed Admissions"] > 90)
].copy()
df = df.sort_values("Secure/Mixed Admissions", ascending=False)
answer = df["County"].tolist()
answer = [str(x) + " County" for x in answer]

ideal_code.intent: Which NY counties had between 350 and 600 children in foster care in 2023?
ideal_code.code:
import boto3
import pandas as pd
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config
from io import StringIO

bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
key = "datagov/jail-population-by-county-beginning-1997/files/rows.txt"
s3 = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))
body = s3.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=key)["Body"].read().decode("utf-8")
df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(body))
df = df[df["Year"] == 2021].copy()
df = df[df["Facility Name (ORI)"] != "All NYC Facilities"].copy()
df["County"] = df["Facility Name (ORI)"].str.extract(r"^(.+?) County")
df = df.dropna(subset=["County"])
df = df.groupby("County", as_index=False)["Census"].sum()
df = df[df["Census"] < 750].copy()
df = df.sort_values("Census", ascending=False)
answer = df["County"].head(10).tolist()
answer = [str(x) + " County" for x in answer]

ideal_code.intent: Which NY counties had between 5,000 and 18,000 adult mental health clinic recipients for the OMH Licensed Clinic Treatment control group in 2015?
ideal_code.code:
import boto3
import pandas as pd
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config
from io import StringIO

bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
key = "datagov/nys-school-tax-relief-star-reimbursement-by-county-beginning-levy-year-1998/files/rows.txt"
s3 = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))
body = s3.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=key)["Body"].read().decode("utf-8")
df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(body))
df = df[
    (df["Levy Year"] == 2022)
    & (df["County"] != "New York City")
    & (df["Number of Basic Exemptions"] > 65500)
].copy()
df = df.sort_values("Number of Basic Exemptions", ascending=False)
answer = df["County"].tolist()
answer = [str(x) + " County" for x in answer]

ideal_code.intent: Which of <intersection of nodes 1-3> had Temporary Assistance cases between 4,000 and 6,000 in February 2023?
ideal_code.code:
import boto3
import pandas as pd
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config
from io import StringIO

bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
key = "datagov/public-assistance-pa-caseloads-and-expenditures-beginning-2002/files/rows.txt"
s3 = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))
body = s3.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=key)["Body"].read().decode("utf-8")
df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(body))
candidates = ["Suffolk", "Monroe", "Onondaga"]
df = df[
    (df["Year"] == 2023)
    & (df["Month"] == "February")
    & (df["District"].isin(candidates))
    & (df["Total Temporary Assistance Cases"].between(4000, 6000))
].copy()
df = df.sort_values("Total Temporary Assistance Cases", ascending=False)
answer = [str(x) + " County" for x in df["District"].tolist()]

ideal_code.intent: Which of <intersection of nodes 1-3> had social services staff between 600 and 1,000 in 2017?
ideal_code.code:
import boto3
import pandas as pd
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config
from io import StringIO

bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
key = "datagov/local-social-services-district-ssd-staff-counts-by-function-beginning-state-fiscal-ye-2004/files/rows.txt"
s3 = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))
body = s3.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=key)["Body"].read().decode("utf-8")
df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(body))
candidates = ["Suffolk", "Monroe", "Onondaga"]
df = df[
    (df["State Fiscal Year Ending"] == 2017)
    & (df["District"].isin(candidates))
    & (df["Total Staffing"].between(600, 1000))
].copy()
df = df.sort_values("Total Staffing", ascending=False)
answer = [str(x) + " County" for x in df["District"].tolist()]

ideal_code.intent: Which of <intersection of nodes 1-3> had Public Assistance case openings between 200 and 400 in March 2021?
ideal_code.code:
import boto3
import pandas as pd
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config
from io import StringIO

bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
key = "datagov/public-assistance-cases-opened-by-month-beginning-2006/files/rows.txt"
s3 = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))
body = s3.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=key)["Body"].read().decode("utf-8")
df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(body))
candidates = ["Suffolk", "Monroe", "Onondaga"]
df = df[
    (df["Year"] == 2021)
    & (df["Month"] == "March")
    & (df["District"].isin(candidates))
    & (df["Total Public Assistance Case Openings"].between(200, 400))
].copy()
df = df.sort_values("Total Public Assistance Case Openings", ascending=False)
answer = [str(x) + " County" for x in df["District"].tolist()]

ideal_query.intent: Which NY counties had SNAP households between 29,000 and 75,000 in February 2023?
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT "District" || ' County' AS answer
FROM t
WHERE TRY_CAST("Year" AS INTEGER)=2023 AND "Month" = 'February' AND TRY_CAST("Total SNAP Households" AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 29000 AND 75000
ORDER BY TRY_CAST("Total SNAP Households" AS DOUBLE) DESC

ideal_query.intent: Which NY counties had between 350 and 600 children in foster care in 2023?
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT upper(substr(lower("County"),1,1)) || substr(lower("County"),2) || ' County' AS answer
FROM t
WHERE TRY_CAST("Year" AS INTEGER)=2023 AND TRY_CAST("Children In Care" AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 350 AND 600
ORDER BY TRY_CAST("Children In Care" AS DOUBLE) DESC

ideal_query.intent: Which NY counties had between 5,000 and 18,000 adult mental health clinic recipients for the OMH Licensed Clinic Treatment control group in 2015?
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT "County Label" || ' County' AS answer
FROM t
WHERE TRY_CAST("Service Year" AS INTEGER)=2015 AND "Age Group" = 'Adult' AND "Rate Code Group" = 'OMH Licensed Clinic Treatment' AND TRY_CAST("Count of Recipients by Rate Code Group and County" AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 5000 AND 18000
ORDER BY TRY_CAST("Count of Recipients by Rate Code Group and County" AS DOUBLE) DESC

ideal_query.intent: Which of <intersection of nodes 1-3> had Temporary Assistance cases between 4,000 and 6,000 in February 2023?
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT "District" || ' County' AS answer
FROM t
WHERE TRY_CAST("Year" AS INTEGER)=2023 AND "Month" = 'February' AND "District" IN ('Suffolk','Monroe','Onondaga') AND TRY_CAST("Total Temporary Assistance Cases" AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 4000 AND 6000
ORDER BY TRY_CAST("Total Temporary Assistance Cases" AS DOUBLE) DESC

ideal_query.intent: Which of <intersection of nodes 1-3> had social services staff between 600 and 1,000 in 2017?
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT "District" || ' County' AS answer
FROM t
WHERE TRY_CAST("State Fiscal Year Ending" AS INTEGER)=2017 AND "District" IN ('Suffolk','Monroe','Onondaga') AND TRY_CAST("Total Staffing" AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 600 AND 1000
ORDER BY TRY_CAST("Total Staffing" AS DOUBLE) DESC

ideal_query.intent: Which of <intersection of nodes 1-3> had Public Assistance case openings between 200 and 400 in March 2021?
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT "District" || ' County' AS answer
